links.title: Prefect UI
links.tooltip: Open Prefect 3 flow-runs UI (workstation tailscale IP, port 4200)

links.title: Langfuse UI
links.tooltip: Open Langfuse 3 â€” LLM traces, prompts, experiments (workstation tailscale IP, port 3010)

panels.description: Posts waiting for your approval

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Awaiting Approval" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'awaiting_approval';

panels.title: Approval Queue

panels.description: Average quality score of pending posts

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(quality_score)) AS "Avg Quality" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'awaiting_approval' AND quality_score IS NOT NULL;

panels.title: Avg quality

panels.description: Posts approved within the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Approved" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'published' AND $__timeFilter(updated_at);

panels.title: Approved

panels.description: Posts auto-rejected for low quality within the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Auto-Rejected" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'rejected' AND $__timeFilter(updated_at);

panels.title: Rejected

panels.description: Quality score distribution of pending posts

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN quality_score < 70 THEN '<70' WHEN quality_score < 75 THEN '70-74' WHEN quality_score < 80 THEN '75-79' WHEN quality_score < 85 THEN '80-84' WHEN quality_score < 90 THEN '85-89' ELSE '90+' END AS "Score Range", COUNT(*) AS "Posts" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'awaiting_approval' AND quality_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Quality Distribution (Pending Approval)

panels.description: Approval activity over the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(updated_at, '1d') AS time, status AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at) AND status IN ('published', 'rejected', 'awaiting_approval') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Approval Activity

panels.description: Click on any row to review the post. Sorted by quality score (highest first).

targets.rawSql: SELECT title AS "Title", quality_score AS "Quality", category AS "Category", AGE(NOW(), created_at)::text AS "Age", LEFT(task_id::text, 8) AS "Task ID", (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'preview_base_url') || '/preview/' || (metadata->>'preview_token') AS "Preview" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'awaiting_approval' ORDER BY quality_score DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC LIMIT 50;

panels.title: Posts Awaiting Your Approval

panels.description: Tasks currently being processed

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "In Progress" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'in_progress';

panels.title: Active gen

panels.description: Tasks waiting in the queue

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Pending" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'pending';

panels.title: Queue Depth

panels.description: Tasks completed in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Completed" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status IN ('awaiting_approval', 'published', 'rejected') AND $__timeFilter(updated_at);

panels.title: Completed

panels.description: Failed tasks in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Failed" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status IN ('failed', 'validation_failed', 'validation_error') AND $__timeFilter(updated_at);

panels.title: Failed

panels.description: Throughput â€” posts generated per hour

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, $__interval) AS time, COUNT(*) AS value FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Generation Throughput

panels.description: Real-time task status across the pipeline

targets.rawSql: SELECT LEFT(COALESCE(title, topic, '(no title)'), 70) AS "Title", status AS "Status", stage AS "Stage", quality_score AS "Score", category AS "Category", to_char(updated_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS "Updated" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Recent Pipeline Activity

panels.description: Percentage of completed tasks that reached awaiting_approval or better.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('awaiting_approval', 'approved', 'published'))::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('rejected', 'awaiting_approval', 'approved', 'published')), 0), 1) AS "Approval %" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at);

panels.title: Approval Rate

panels.description: Mean quality_score across all tasks with a recorded score in the window.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(quality_score)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Score" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE quality_score IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at);

panels.title: Avg quality

panels.description: Total tasks created in the window (any status).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Tasks" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at);

panels.title: Tasks (win)

panels.description: Total posts generated in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Generated" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at);

panels.title: Posts gen

panels.description: Total published posts on your site

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Published" FROM posts WHERE status = 'published' AND $__timeFilter(published_at);

panels.title: Published

panels.description: quality_score distribution split by approved vs rejected. Wide spread = high generation variance.

targets.rawSql: SELECT quality_score AS approved FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status IN ('awaiting_approval','approved','published') AND quality_score IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT -quality_score AS rejected FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'rejected' AND quality_score IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at);

panels.title: Score Distribution (approved positive / rejected negative)

panels.description: Distribution of quality scores in generated content

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN quality_score >= 90 THEN '90-100 Excellent' WHEN quality_score >= 80 THEN '80-89 Good' WHEN quality_score >= 70 THEN '70-79 Fair' WHEN quality_score >= 60 THEN '60-69 Weak' ELSE '<60 Poor' END AS "Score", COUNT(*) AS "Posts" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE quality_score IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC;

panels.title: Quality Distribution

panels.description: Top categories by output volume

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(category, 'uncategorized') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Content by Category

panels.description: Quality scores over time â€” are we improving?

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, $__interval) AS time, ROUND(AVG(quality_score)) AS "Avg Quality", MAX(quality_score) AS "Max", MIN(quality_score) AS "Min" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND quality_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Quality Score Trend

panels.description: Highest scoring published posts

targets.rawSql: SELECT title AS "Title", quality_score AS "Score", category AS "Category" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'published' AND quality_score IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY quality_score DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Top Quality Published Posts

panels.description: Rejection rate over the selected time window. Lower is better â€” but a 0% rate with low throughput often means content isn't being generated.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'rejected')::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('rejected', 'awaiting_approval', 'approved', 'published')), 0), 1) AS "Rejection %" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at);

panels.title: Rejection Rate

panels.description: Stacked time series of rejection reasons classified from error_message. Reveals which veto source dominates over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(created_at, '$__interval'), CASE WHEN error_message LIKE '%fabricated%' OR error_message LIKE '%Fabricated%' THEN 'fabricated_content' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Named source without%' THEN 'named_source_no_url' WHEN error_message LIKE '%dead link%' OR error_message LIKE '%Dead link%' THEN 'dead_links' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Unlinked citation%' THEN 'unlinked_citation' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Hallucinated%' OR error_message LIKE '%hallucinated library%' THEN 'hallucinated_ref' WHEN error_message LIKE '%internal_consistency%' AND error_message LIKE '%veto: internal_consistency%' THEN 'internal_consistency_veto' WHEN error_message LIKE '%score-gate%' THEN 'score_gate' WHEN error_message LIKE '%citation_verifier%' THEN 'citation_verifier' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Off-brand%' THEN 'off_brand' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Semantic duplicate%' THEN 'semantic_dup' ELSE 'other' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'rejected' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Rejection Reasons Over Time

panels.description: Rate of programmatic_validator warnings per rule category. Drawn from the content_validator_warnings_total counter (GH-91).
panels.title: Hallucination Warnings (rate 5m) by Rule

panels.description: Approval vs rejection rates over time â€” track human oversight effectiveness

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, $__interval) AS time, status AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND status IN ('published', 'rejected', 'awaiting_approval') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Approval Mix Over Time

panels.description: Breakdown of the last 100 rejections by classified reason.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN error_message LIKE '%fabricated%' OR error_message LIKE '%Fabricated%' THEN 'fabricated_content' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Named source without%' THEN 'named_source_no_url' WHEN error_message LIKE '%dead link%' OR error_message LIKE '%Dead link%' THEN 'dead_links' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Unlinked citation%' THEN 'unlinked_citation' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Hallucinated%' OR error_message LIKE '%hallucinated library%' THEN 'hallucinated_ref' WHEN error_message LIKE '%score-gate%' THEN 'score_gate' WHEN error_message LIKE '%veto: internal_consistency%' THEN 'internal_consistency_veto' WHEN error_message LIKE '%citation_verifier%' THEN 'citation_verifier' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Off-brand%' THEN 'off_brand' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Semantic duplicate%' THEN 'semantic_dup' ELSE 'other' END AS "Reason", COUNT(*) AS "Count", ROUND(AVG(quality_score)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Score" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status = 'rejected' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;

panels.title: Top Rejection Reasons (in window)

panels.description: Per-writer-model approval rate â€” reads models_used_by_phase JSON for writer model. Helps compare writer performance across batches.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(models_used_by_phase->>'writer', 'unknown') AS "Writer Model", COUNT(*) AS "Tasks", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('awaiting_approval','approved','published')) AS "Approved", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('awaiting_approval','approved','published'))::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS "Approval %", ROUND(AVG(quality_score)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Score" FROM pipeline_tasks_view WHERE status IN ('rejected','awaiting_approval','approved','published') AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC;

panels.title: Approval Rate by Writer Model
Open batches
panels.description: Topic batches in `open` state. When >0 you have decisions to make.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Open batches" FROM topic_batches WHERE status = 'open'

panels.title: Last batch h
panels.description: Time since the discovery sweep last produced anything.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(created_at))) / 3600, 1) AS "Hours" FROM topic_batches

panels.title: Ranked (24h)
panels.description: Candidates the discovery sweep produced in last 24h (external + internal RAG).

targets.rawSql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topic_candidates WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_topic_candidates WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS "Candidates"

panels.title: Active niches
panels.description: Niches with active=true â€” each has its own discovery sweep.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Active niches" FROM niches WHERE active = true

panels.title: Open batches awaiting your decision
panels.description: Each row = one open topic batch with its top candidate. To resolve: poindexter topics resolve-batch <batch_id> (or MCP topics_show_batch from your phone).

targets.rawSql: SELECT n.slug AS "Niche", tb.id::text AS "Batch ID", ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - tb.created_at))/3600, 1) AS "Hours open", COALESCE(tc.title, '(no candidates yet)') AS "Top candidate", ROUND((tc.score * tc.decay_factor)::numeric, 3) AS "Score", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM topic_candidates WHERE batch_id = tb.id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_topic_candidates WHERE batch_id = tb.id) AS "Candidates" FROM topic_batches tb JOIN niches n ON n.id = tb.niche_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL (  SELECT title, score, decay_factor FROM topic_candidates   WHERE batch_id = tb.id ORDER BY (score * decay_factor) DESC LIMIT 1) tc ON true WHERE tb.status = 'open' ORDER BY tb.created_at ASC

panels.title: Recent batch decisions (7 days)
panels.description: Closed batches with the picked candidate â€” retroactive review of what got shipped to research/draft.

targets.rawSql: SELECT n.slug AS "Niche", tb.status AS "Status", tb.resolved_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "Resolved", tb.picked_candidate_kind AS "Kind", COALESCE(tc.title, ic.distilled_topic, '(skipped)') AS "Picked" FROM topic_batches tb JOIN niches n ON n.id = tb.niche_id LEFT JOIN topic_candidates tc ON tc.id = tb.picked_candidate_id LEFT JOIN internal_topic_candidates ic ON ic.id = tb.picked_candidate_id WHERE tb.status != 'open' AND tb.resolved_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY tb.resolved_at DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Media awaiting review
panels.description: Generated podcasts/videos/shorts queued for operator approval

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Pending Media" FROM media_approvals WHERE status = 'pending';

panels.title: Oldest pending
panels.description: Age of the oldest pending media â€” surfaces stuck items (green <24h, yellow <7d, red â‰¥7d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MIN(created_at))) AS "Oldest pending" FROM media_approvals WHERE status = 'pending';

panels.title: Page views (last 24h)
panels.description: Page views from CF Analytics Engine landed in page_views by sync_cloudflare_analytics. Red at 0 means the Worker beacon or the sync job is broken (silent-failure detector â€” the same regression mode that ran 2026-04-09 â†’ 2026-05-28).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Page views" FROM page_views WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

panels.title: media_approvals â€” approved (window)
panels.description: Approved media_approvals in the dashboard time window, filtered on decided_at.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Approved" FROM media_approvals WHERE status='approved' AND $__timeFilter(decided_at);

panels.title: Posts with shot list (window)
panels.description: Posts where the video director produced a non-null video_shot_list, filtered on posts.updated_at within the dashboard time window. PR #650.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "With shot list" FROM posts WHERE video_shot_list IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(updated_at);

panels.title: Director: shot list produced
panels.description: audit_log rows where event_type='video_director.shot_list_produced' in the dashboard time window. Emitted by services/stages/generate_video_shot_list.py once the video-shot-list stage runs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Produced" FROM audit_log WHERE event_type='video_director.shot_list_produced' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp);

panels.title: Director: shot list failed
panels.description: audit_log rows where event_type='video_director.shot_list_failed' in the dashboard time window. Any nonzero count is a regression signal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Failed" FROM audit_log WHERE event_type='video_director.shot_list_failed' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp);

panels.title: Media auto-rejected by quality (window)
panels.description: media_approvals rows the Layer 1 quality gate auto-rejected (decided_by LIKE 'auto:layer1%'). PR #648 wired this gate to write quality_score on every decision.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Auto-rejected" FROM media_approvals WHERE decided_by LIKE 'auto:layer1%' AND status='rejected' AND $__timeFilter(decided_at);

panels.title: Pending by medium
panels.description: Pending media_approvals rows grouped by medium type

targets.rawSql: SELECT medium AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM media_approvals WHERE status = 'pending' GROUP BY medium ORDER BY medium;

panels.title: media_approvals â€” rejected by medium
panels.description: Rejected media_approvals grouped by medium (podcast / video / video_short) in the dashboard time window. Filtered on decided_at.

targets.rawSql: SELECT medium AS metric, COUNT(*)::int AS value FROM media_approvals WHERE status='rejected' AND $__timeFilter(decided_at) GROUP BY medium ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.title: Quality eval score by medium
panels.description: Per-medium quality_score from media_approvals over time. quality_evaluated_at drives the x-axis; one series per medium (podcast / video / video_short). PR #648.

targets.rawSql: SELECT quality_evaluated_at AS time, medium AS metric, quality_score::float AS value FROM media_approvals WHERE quality_score IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(quality_evaluated_at) ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Media Pipeline (Stage 2)
panels.description: Render-side telemetry from atom_runs (media.* atoms), durable asset counts, Gate-2 pipeline depth, dispatch success rates, and failure findings from audit_log. Plan 8c / #678.

panels.title: Render success rate (24h)
panels.description: Percentage of media.* atom runs that completed successfully in the last 24 hours. Covers render_video, render_short, persist, and qa atoms.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
  1
) AS "Success %"
FROM atom_runs
WHERE atom LIKE 'media.%'
  AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24h'

panels.title: Render failures (24h)
panels.description: Count of non-success runs for media.* atoms in the last 24 hours. See 'Recent render failures' table below for details.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Failures"
FROM atom_runs
WHERE atom LIKE 'media.%'
  AND status != 'success'
  AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24h'

panels.title: Videos persisted (total)
panels.description: Total durable task-keyed video assets on disk (all time). Written by the media.persist atom. Includes both long and short form.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Assets"
FROM media_assets
WHERE type IN ('video_long', 'video_short')
  AND COALESCE(storage_path, '') != ''

panels.title: Gate-2 pending
panels.description: Video assets awaiting operator Gate-2 approval (video = long form, video_short = Shorts). Seeded by MediaDistributeJob link pass.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Pending"
FROM media_approvals
WHERE medium IN ('video', 'video_short')
  AND status = 'pending'

panels.title: Gate-2 dispatched (total)
panels.description: Total video approval rows that have been dispatched to YouTube (all time). Covers both long form (shorts=False) and Shorts (shorts=True).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Dispatched"
FROM media_approvals
WHERE medium IN ('video', 'video_short')
  AND dispatched_at IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Dispatch success rate
panels.description: Percentage of dispatched video approvals where the YouTube upload succeeded (dispatch_success=true). NULL / orange when nothing dispatched yet.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dispatch_success = true) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dispatched_at IS NOT NULL), 0),
  1
) AS "Success %"
FROM media_approvals
WHERE medium IN ('video', 'video_short')

panels.title: Render latency by atom (avg, success runs)
panels.description: Average wall-clock time per successful media.* atom run (all time). Identifies which atom dominates pipeline duration.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT atom AS metric,
       ROUND(AVG(latency_ms)::numeric / 1000.0, 1) AS value
FROM atom_runs
WHERE atom LIKE 'media.%'
  AND status = 'success'
GROUP BY atom
ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Gate-2 pipeline by medium
panels.description: Per-medium pipeline depth across all Gate-2 stages. video = long form, video_short = Shorts. 'Dispatch OK' is the final happy-path count.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  medium                                                        AS "Medium",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'pending')                   AS "Pending",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'approved')                  AS "Approved",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'rejected')                  AS "Rejected",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dispatched_at IS NOT NULL)            AS "Dispatched",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dispatch_success = true)              AS "Dispatch OK"
FROM media_approvals
WHERE medium IN ('video', 'video_short')
GROUP BY medium
ORDER BY medium

panels.title: Recent render failures (findings)
panels.description: Most recent render_failed findings from media render atoms. Emitted by _media_render.py when the video renderer fails after all retries.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp         AS "Time",
  source            AS "Source",
  severity          AS "Sev",
  details->>'title' AS "Title"
FROM audit_log
WHERE event_type = 'finding'
  AND details->>'kind' = 'render_failed'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Recent dispatch failures (findings)
panels.description: Most recent media_dispatch_failed findings from the dispatch_media_pipeline job. Emitted when a Gate-2-approved video fails to upload to YouTube.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp         AS "Time",
  source            AS "Source",
  severity          AS "Sev",
  details->>'title' AS "Title"
FROM audit_log
WHERE event_type = 'finding'
  AND details->>'kind' = 'media_dispatch_failed'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Pipeline Throttle & Stale-Task Sweeper Â· Prometheus

panels.description: poindexter_pipeline_throttle_active â€” 1 when the approval queue is full and the pipeline has stopped advancing. Exported by services/metrics_exporter.py but previously charted nowhere, so a stalled pipeline was invisible on Grafana.
panels.title: Throttle state

panels.description: poindexter_pipeline_throttle_queue_size â€” current awaiting_approval depth as last observed by the throttle check. Compare against the limit in the timeseries below.
panels.title: Approval queue size

panels.description: poindexter_pipeline_throttle_seconds_total â€” cumulative seconds the pipeline has spent throttled by the approval queue. Defined as a Gauge (survives worker restarts) so it is shown as a raw cumulative value, NOT a rate.
panels.title: Throttled time (cumulative)

panels.description: poindexter_pipeline_auto_cancelled_total â€” cumulative tasks auto-cancelled by the stale-task sweeper (read from pipeline_tasks.auto_cancelled_at). A climbing value means worker heartbeats are going missing or stale_task_timeout_minutes is too aggressive. Gauge-backed â†’ shown as a raw cumulative value.
panels.title: Auto-cancelled tasks (cumulative)

panels.description: Approval queue depth (poindexter_pipeline_throttle_queue_size) plotted against the configured limit (poindexter_pipeline_throttle_queue_limit). When the size line touches the limit line the pipeline throttles â€” correlate with the 'Throttle state' tile above.
panels.title: Approval queue depth vs limit
Per-Stage Latency Â· Prometheus (populates during active pipeline runs)

panels.description: p95 execution latency per pipeline node, from the poindexter_pipeline_node_duration_seconds histogram (services/template_runner.py). Answers 'which of the canonical_blog stages is slow' â€” the writer/QA nodes should dominate. NOTE: this metric was added 2026-06-02 and only appears after the worker image is rebuilt/restarted and at least one pipeline run has executed; until then this reads 'No data'.
panels.title: Per-stage p95 latency

panels.description: Node completions per minute split by terminal outcome (ok / halted / timeout / error), from the _count series of the node-duration histogram. A rising 'timeout'/'error' line points at the failing stage; correlate with the p95 panel. Same worker-rebuild dependency as the p95 panel.
panels.title: Stage completions/min by outcome
Recent partial renders (findings)
panels.description: Most recent partial_render findings — emitted when some-but-not-all shots rendered successfully. Indicates mid-render failures that still produced an output file.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  timestamp         AS "Time",
  source            AS "Source",
  severity          AS "Sev",
  details->>'title' AS "Title"
FROM audit_log
WHERE event_type = 'finding'
  AND details->>'kind' = 'partial_render'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Render outcomes by atom (success vs failure)
panels.description: Per-atom success and failure counts from atom_runs for media.* and qa.audio atoms. Distinguishes which render step is failing most.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  atom AS "Atom",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') AS "Success",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'success') AS "Failures",
  COUNT(*) AS "Total",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 1) AS "Success %"
FROM atom_runs
WHERE atom LIKE 'media.%'
   OR atom = 'qa.audio'
GROUP BY atom
ORDER BY atom

panels.title: Shot vision-QA outcomes (window)
panels.description: Per-shot vision-QA render-check outcomes (video-quality Piece 2). accepted = passed first try; regenerated = re-rolled then passed; fallback_holdover = below threshold, held over the prior clip; kept_below = below threshold at idx 0, kept best. Sourced from video_shot_rendered audit rows enriched by shot_list_renderer; shot_quality_fallback findings also land on /d/findings.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  details->>'qa_outcome'                         AS "Outcome",
  COUNT(*)                                       AS "Shots",
  ROUND(AVG((details->>'qa_score')::numeric), 1) AS "Avg score"
FROM audit_log
WHERE event_type = 'video_shot_rendered'
  AND details->>'qa_outcome' IS NOT NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Drafts pending review
panels.description: Social post drafts waiting for operator approval

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Pending" FROM social_post_drafts WHERE status = 'pending';

panels.title: Drafts posted (total)
panels.description: Social post drafts successfully sent via Postiz

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Posted" FROM social_post_drafts WHERE status = 'posted';

panels.title: Drafts failed (total)
panels.description: Social post drafts that failed posting

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Failed" FROM social_post_drafts WHERE status = 'failed';

panels.title: Social draft activity (Prometheus)
panels.description: Draft created/posted/failed per 5m from Prometheus counters

panels.title: Social drafts — per-post breakdown
panels.description: Per-draft detail: platform, status, error message, retry count, Postiz post ID, and timestamps. Shows the 50 most recent drafts. Drill into error column to diagnose failed Postiz submissions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  id,
  post_id,
  platform,
  status,
  COALESCE(error, '') AS error,
  retry_count,
  COALESCE(postiz_post_id::text, '') AS postiz_post_id,
  LEFT(content, 120) AS content,
  created_at,
  posted_at
FROM social_post_drafts
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

title: Pipeline
description: CHARTER: diagnose the content pipeline — where tasks are, why they failed or were rejected, and what media/approvals are waiting. Answers 'why is nothing publishing?'. Everything pipeline-shaped: approval queue, live operations, QA decisions, content quality. Replaces approval-queue / pipeline-operations / qa-observability / quality-content as separate dashboards.
